data.content: Shipment review APPROVED. All 3 commits (b19cf45ce120 merge, 684aa6cd7822 + b13e400716de implementation) confirmed on main. Zero ESLint max-lines/max-lines-per-function/max-len warnings in all 22 target files. TypeScript clean, 2239 tests pass, 0 failures. No regressions. Remaining lint warnings are in test files outside beat scope.
